de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.SEDSAXHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.xml.sax.helpers.DefaultHandler
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.SEDSAXHandler
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ContentHandler, DTDHandler, EntityResolver, ErrorHandler
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicLayoutReader

    private class SymbolicLayoutReader.SEDSAXHandler
extends DefaultHandler
    DefaultHandler implementation used in ExecutionNodeReader.read(InputStream).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
